---
title: "Daniel IAO"
subtitle: "Academic & Consultant"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 14em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}}"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0394-3827
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/YOUR-LINKEDIN-USERNAME
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/danieliavila
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:daniel.avila@su.se"
---


## Overview
Welcome to my research and consultancy portfolio. My work focuses on ---------------------------------------------------.

This portal serves as an interactive hub for my on-going projects, including materials prepared for the **World Biodiversity Forum at Davos, Switzerland**.

## Key Focus Areas
* **-----:**
* **-----:**
* **Corporate Sustainability:**
